name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】 🔥🔥🔥Ophidia Collection
Style 795194 This Ophidia shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two detachable straps: one chain and one leather, accented with the classic striped beige and ebony GG logo. Detachable chain strap (22cm high); Detachable adjustable leather strap (length adjustable between 50cm and 57cm)
Zip closure with original packaging
